cards.title: Vulnerability Management Program Implementation
values: No policy, scan approval, priority model, or verification loop existed.
Policy notes, seven scans, CVE mapping, and scripts trace the work.
Findings fell from 32 to 4, with criticals eliminated.

cards.title: DISA STIG Remediation Project
values: Windows 11 STIG findings needed scripted fixes and validation proof.
STIG IDs map to scripts, checks, and failed/fixed/passed screenshots.
Selected controls are documented without claiming full compliance.

cards.title: Password Spray Threat Hunt: RDP Compromise Investigation
values: RDP access after password spraying needed full endpoint pivots.
KQL ties logon, process, registry, file, and network telemetry.
The report reconstructs the attack path and attempted exfiltration.

cards.title: The Buyer / Akira Ransomware Threat Hunt
values: Akira activity needed host scoping, timeline rebuild, and gap review.
MDE ties ransom artifacts, AnyDesk access, tooling, and tampering.
Affected hosts, IOC timing, and detection recommendations are documented.
